description: Perform a Three-Point Resection (Snellius-Pothenot problem) in GeoGebra to determine the coordinates of station point P, located south of three known landmarks: A=(-300, 200), B=(100, 500), and C=(400, -100). Use the 'Circle of Position' method (finding the intersection of two loci circles) based on measured horizontal angles APB = 40° and BPC = 70°. Save the completed construction as 'resection_solution.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
